ogTitle: Trawalla vs Traynors Lagoon: Climate Safety

heading: Trawalla vs Traynors Lagoon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Trawalla, Victoria and Traynors Lagoon, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Traynors Lagoon has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Trawalla (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Trawalla or Traynors Lagoon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Trawalla has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Traynors Lagoon scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Trawalla scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Traynors Lagoon scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Trawalla or Traynors Lagoon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Traynors Lagoon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
